title: Catch Em' Together
description: Multiplayer Pixelmon Experience, Catching Pixelmon is better together
body:
Want to catch Pixelmon in Minecraft with your friends? This Modpack based around the fan-made mod, Pixelmon. This Modpack is meant to be played with friends as there's numerous additions for that: - Optimised to be played on lower-end machines - Added a few content mod to assist with communication, transportation and storage
External Mods
  • Botany Pots - Pixelmon Compat by DarkhaxDev
  • Explorer's Compass by Chaosyr
Server files in additional files.
